headline: Netflix Taps Sam Worthington for High-Stakes Harlan Coben Thriller
lede: Netflix is doubling down on its international mystery slate with a gripping limited series adaptation that promises pulse-pounding drama. Sam Worthington leads the charge in 'I Will Find You', set to premiere globally this summer.
body:
Netflix's summer programming slate just got a major adrenaline boost with the upcoming limited series 'I Will Find You', a taut adaptation of Harlan Coben's bestselling novel that marks another strategic play in the streamer's international content strategy.

Directed by Robert Hull, the series centers on David (Worthington), a character thrust into a labyrinthine mystery that promises to keep viewers on the edge of their seats. The streamer's calculated bet on Coben's narrative prowess continues to pay dividends, with previous adaptations like 'The Stranger' and 'Stay Close' demonstrating robust audience engagement.

The first-look imagery suggests a moody, atmospheric thriller with high production values typical of Netflix's premium limited series approach. Worthington, known for his intense dramatic performances, appears perfectly cast as a protagonist navigating complex emotional and narrative terrain.

Netflix continues to position itself as a premiere destination for international crime narratives, leveraging global storytelling talent and compelling source material. The June 18 premiere signals the platform's commitment to delivering sophisticated, character-driven mysteries that transcend traditional genre boundaries.
key_facts: Netflix limited series based on Harlan Coben novel
Sam Worthington stars as lead character David
Part of Netflix's international mystery content strategy
